name: Spicy Sesame Noodle, Green Bean and Carrot Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 small serrano chilies, stemmed, thinly sliced into rounds
9 ounces green beans, trimmed and cut diagonally into 1/2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, stir together the first eight ingredients to blend. Season with salt and pepper.
2. Let stand for 30 minutes to allow flavors to blend.
3. Cook the green beans in a large pot of boiling salted water until crisp-tender, about 2 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer the beans to cold water to cool. Drain well.
4. Pat the pasta dry with paper towels.
5. Return the water to a boil. Add the pasta and cook until just tender but still firm to bite, stirring often, about 2 minutes. Drain.
6. Rinse the pasta under cold water and drain well.
7. Combine the green beans, pasta, carrots, green onions, and dressing in a large bowl. Toss to coat.
8. Season with salt and pepper. (Can be made up to 6 hours ahead. Cover; chill.)
